segments.text: O Lord, You have searched me and known me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You know my sitting down and my rising up; You understand my thought afar off.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You comprehend my path and my lying down, And are acquainted with all my ways.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For there is not a word on my tongue, But behold, O Lord, You know it altogether.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have hedged me behind and before, And laid Your hand upon me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; It is high, I cannot attain it.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Where can I go from Your Spirit? Or where can I flee from Your presence?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I ascend into heaven, You are there; If I make my bed in hell, behold, You are there.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I take the wings of the morning, And dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Even there Your hand shall lead me, And Your right hand shall hold me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I say, 'Surely the darkness shall fall on me,' Even the night shall be light about me;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Indeed, the darkness shall not hide from You, But the night shines as the day; The darkness and the light are both alike to You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For You formed my inward parts; You covered me in my mother's womb.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will praise You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; Marvelous are Your works, And that my soul knows very well.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My frame was not hidden from You, When I was made in secret, And skillfully wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Your eyes saw my substance, being yet unformed. And in Your book they all were written, The days fashioned for me, When as yet there were none of them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How precious also are Your thoughts to me, O God! How great is the sum of them!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I should count them, they would be more in number than the sand; When I awake, I am still with You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, that You would slay the wicked, O God! Depart from me, therefore, you bloodthirsty men.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For they speak against You wickedly; Your enemies take Your name in vain.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do I not hate them, O Lord, who hate You? And do I not loathe those who rise up against You?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I hate them with perfect hatred; I count them my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Search me, O God, and know my heart; Try me, and know my anxieties;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And see if there is any wicked way in me, And lead me in the way everlasting.
segments.speaker: David
